title.rendered: How To Redefine Leadership Without Needing Full Control

content.rendered: Many leaders believe that if you just put more hours into the business, it will all work out! In this episode of In the Now, Paul Marston, a CEO coach with C12 along with David Reske, CEO of Nowspeed, explore how the best CEOs are able to give up control and delegate to people in order to build their business and create the life they really want. According to Paul, it’s not about hours, it’s about results, and it’s important to be as deliberate with your business as you are with your family and the rest of your life. Listen now!
